programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Under the guise of Jesse, Yubel faces off against Zane in a confrontation that ends up having heart-stopping consequences!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: As the battle draws to a close, Zane looks to make one last push to free Jesse from Yubel's mind-controlling clutches before his heart forces him to throw in the towel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: With the power of Exodia by his side, Adrian Gecko takes on Yubel in a duel to rule!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: The clash between Adrian and Yubel continues as Adrian attempts to unleash the Ultimate Forbidden One!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jaden duels Jesse in an attempt to break Yubel's hold over him.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jaden, with the help of his Elemental Heroes, tries to free Jesse's spirit from Yubel's control.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: With Jesse safe and sound, Jaden agrees to settle the score once and for all with Yubel!
programme.sub-title: Return of the Supreme King, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: With the help of Jesse's deck and the power of the Supreme King, Jaden looks to deal a final blow to Yubel and free his friends from their dimensional detentions!
programme.sub-title: Return of the Supreme King, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: In order to free his friends, Jaden must first figure out a way to destroy Yubel's ultimate incarnation! Can Jaden stop the unstoppable, or will this nightmare of a beast put any and all dreams of a rescue to rest?!
programme.sub-title: Return of the Supreme King, Part 3

programme.title: The returned Orochi clashes the Akazaya members who are trying to save Momonosuke. Meanwhile, Luffy and the others are all covered in bruises, but they unite their strength and launch an attack.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Supernovas Strike Back! The Mission to Tear Apart the Emperors!

programme.title: Even after Big Mom was pushed off of the island, Zoro and the others keep fighting the exhausting battle against Kaido. When Kaido tries to beat up the unconscious Luffy, Zoro launches an all-out attack at the risk of his life.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Defend Luffy! Zoro and Law’s Sword Technique!

programme.title: Luffy remembers how he was advised by his friends, how he was saved by his comrades, and the frustrations of being defeated. As Kaido mocks him to his face, the Color of the Supreme King Haki gushes out and they clash again.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Surpass the Emperor of the Sea! Luffy Strikes Back with an Iron Fist!

programme.title: Countless souls have been lured along the Grand Line in pursuit of the legendary One Piece! Luffy D. Monkey is a young pirate with a dream: to prove the legend true and be king of them all!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: I'm Luffy! The Man Who's Gonna Be King of the Pirates!

programme.title: Luffy and his new companion Coby set sail in search of the infamous pirate hunter Zoro, rumored to be held captive at the Marine Base.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Enter the Great Swordsman! Pirate Hunter Roronoa Zoro!

programme.title: Luffy is in the line of fire after saving Zoro, and now tyrannical Captain Morgan is out for their heads! Zoro must decide if he will join forces with Luffy or die in captivity.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Morgan versus Luffy! Who's the Mysterious Pretty Girl?

programme.title: Luffy recalls a time when Captain Red-Haired Shanks taught him a valuable lesson in friendship and set him on his quest to be King of the Pirates.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy crosses paths with the clever thief Nami. A navigator on a quest to collect one hundred million berries, she’s perfect for Luffy’s new crew – except for the fact that Nami hates pirates.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Terrifying Mysterious Power! Captain Buggy, the Clown Pirate!

programme.title: Having delivered a deadly blow to Captain Buggy’s pirates, Luffy and his companions need a place to recuperate. But the three are not in hiding very long before the Beast Tamer Mohji seeks them out.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Desperate Situation! Beast Tamer Mohji vs. Luffy!

programme.title: In the ongoing fight with Captain Buggy’s pirates, Zoro must face off with the Acrobat Cabaji while Luffy continues to do battle with the Pirate Clown himself.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Epic Showdown! Swordsman Zoro vs. Acrobat Cabaji!

programme.title: Luffy and the gang are on the run after the battle with Captain Buggy! With no place to go and nothing else to do, Nami finally agrees to join Luffy on his quest.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Who is the Victor? Devil Fruit Power Showdown!

programme.title: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami arrive at an island hoping to obtain a ship and crew, but the three are quickly confronted with the blustering Captain Usopp – who has a connection to Luffy’s past.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy follows Usopp to the mansion and encounters the brutal pirate Captain Kuro. The scoundrel plans to claim Kaya’s fortune and live the stolen life of luxury.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Weirdest Guy Ever! Jango the Hypnotist!

programme.title: Usopp spreads the word of Kuro’s evil plot and the impending pirate attack, but no one believes his warnings. The Straw Hat Pirates decide to help Usopp put a stop to the dastardly scheme.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Expose the Plot! Pirate Butler, Captain Kuro!

programme.title: Luffy and crew seek to best Captain Kuro, but they’ve prepared their defense on the wrong side of the island! All looks grim now that Usopp must face off against the Black Cat Pirates alone.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Clash with the Black Cat Pirates! The Great Battle on the Slope!

programme.title: In an effort to save Usopp’s village, the Straw Hat Pirates seek to block the marauders’ path from the sea. With Luffy out of the battle, Zoro must face the fearsome Meowban Brothers!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Terrifying Duo! Meowban Brothers vs. Zoro!

programme.title: Nami manages to rescue Zoro’s missing swords and attempts to revive Luffy. With one of the Meowban brothers down, the other rages on even more fiercely than before!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy Back in Action! Miss Kaya's Desperate Resistance!

programme.title: Usopp’s friends run away with the heiress Kaya. Jango races off after them, but not before sending Butchie into a berserk rage. As Zoro continues his battle, Luffy takes on Captain Kuro.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Beat Kuro! Usopp the Man's Tearful Resolve!

programme.title: Luffy battles with Kuro on the beach, while the Veggies (with Kaya in tow) flee Jango the Hypnotist.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Protect Kaya! The Usopp Pirates' Great Efforts!

programme.title: Kaya rewards the Straw Hat Pirates’ efforts to save her with a ship to call their own – the Going Merry!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Anger Explosion! Kuro vs. Luffy! How it Ends!

programme.title: On the legendary Treasure Island, Luffy and crew encounter strange animals and an even stranger man named Gaimon.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: You're the Weird Creature! Gaimon and His Strange Friends!

programme.title: In the past, young Zoro sparred constantly with a girl named Kuina, but he could never claim victory. They vowed that one of them would someday be the world’s greatest swordsman – but tragedy intervened.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Three-Sword Style's Past! Zoro and Kuina's Vow!

programme.title: The Straw Hats need a cook among their crew, so they head to a nearby restaurant and meet a passionate Sous Chef named Sanji.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Famous Cook! Sanji of the Sea Restaurant!

programme.title: Luffy witnesses the fighting prowess and compassionate nature of the Sous Chef Sanji. The good news: The Going Merry’s found a cook! The bad news: He has no intention of joining the crew!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Unwelcome Customer! Sanji's Food and Ghin's Debt!

programme.title: The staff and patrons of the Baratie panic when Don Krieg arrives! The starving pirate begs for nourishment, only to find himself denied. Unable to see a wretch starve, Sanji steps in once again.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Strongest Pirate Fleet! Commodore Don Krieg!

programme.title: Don Krieg promises further malice as he returns to his ship, but the threat to the Baratie proves short-lived as an even bigger threat arrives!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Protect Baratie! The Great Pirate, Red Foot Zeff!

programme.title: The Going Merry’s been stolen by Nami, and the showdown for possession of the Baratie is delayed. But the action’s not dead in the water – Zoro challenges Hawk-Eye Mihawk to a duel!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Hawk-Eye Mihawk! The Great Swordsman Zoro Falls At Sea!

programme.title: The battle begins for possession of the Baratie, with Zeff leading the cooks against Krieg’s pirates. Luffy and crew join the fray, but things aren’t looking too good!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Deadly Foot Technique Bursts Forth! Sanji vs. The Invincible Pearl!

programme.title: Sanji recalls his childhood as an apprentice chef aboard a ship attacked by Red Foot Zeff! When the young Sanji found himself overboard, it was the fearsome captain himself who jumped to the rescue.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Zeff and Sanji's Dream! The Illusory All Blue!

programme.title: As the battle for Baratie rages on, Luffy is forced to take a drastic course of action, and Ghin debates where his loyalties lie.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Cool-headed, Cold-hearted Demon! Pirate Fleet Chief Commander Ghin!

programme.title: The scoundrel Don Krieg appears to have the upper hand in his fight with Luffy. To avoid walking the plank, the rubber man must try a different strategy.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: I Won't Die! Fierce Battle, Luffy vs. Krieg!

programme.title: The standoff between Luffy and Don Krieg takes a turn in favor of the Straw Hats when their captain focuses his onslaught on his opponent’s weaponry.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Conclusion of the Deadly Battle! A Spear of Blind Determination!

programme.title: With Don Krieg defeated, Luffy tries to convince Sanji to join up with the Straw Hats. The skilled cook is interested, but he has something to prove before moving on.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Set Sail! The Seafaring Cook Sets Off With Luffy!

programme.title: Tank Girl, (1995, Action)
programme.desc: In this laugh-a-minute, futuristic thriller, a mega-villain controls the world's water supply, and it's up to Tank Girl and her outrageous cohorts to end his greedy reign.

programme.title: Tomb Raider, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Armed with only her sharp mind, blind faith and stubborn spirit, young Lara Croft pushes past her limits on her very first perilous adventure into the unknown. If she survives, it could be the making of her…earning her the name tomb raider.

programme.title: Criminal, (2016, Action)
programme.desc: The memories and skills of a deceased CIA agent are implanted into an unpredictable and dangerous convict in order to complete the agent's final assignment.

programme.title: Source Code, (2011, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Jake Gyllenhaal stars in this action thriller about a man who awakens in another man’s body to discover only he has the ability to stop a terrorist attack on a commuter train.

programme.title: 57 Seconds, (2024, Action)
programme.desc: Josh Hutcherson and Morgan Freeman star in this heart-racing action thriller. Every second counts for a tech blogger who wields a time-altering device to seek revenge on a ruthless corporate empire and ignites a pulse-pounding battle for survival.

programme.title: Total Recall, (1990, Science fiction)
programme.desc: It's 2084 A.D. and Doug Quaid is haunted by recurring dreams about journeying to Earths closest planetary neighbor, Mars.

programme.title: Attack the Block, (2011, Science fiction)
programme.desc: ATTACK THE BLOCK is a fast, funny, frightening action adventure movie that pits a teen street gang against an invasion of savage alien monsters. It turns a crazy mix of tough street kids into a team of kick ass heroes.

programme.title: Looper, (2012, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In this futuristic action thriller, time travel will be illegal and only available on the black market. When the mob wants to get rid of someone, they will send their target 30 years into the past where a 'looper,' a hired gun, is waiting to mop up.

programme.title: Infinite, (2021, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Evan McCauley has skills he never learned and memories of places he has never visited. Self-medicated and on the brink of a mental breakdown, a secret group that call themselves Infinites come to his rescue, revealing that his memories are real.

programme.title: Saddle Pals, (1947, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry goes to the home of hypochondriac landowner, who gets Gene to switch identities while he takes a vacation, giving Gene power-of-attorney. Gene has to raise $50,000 to save the properties.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks, (1961, Western)
programme.desc: After robbing a Mexican bank, Dad Longworth takes the loot and leaves his partner Rio to be captured but Rio escapes and searches for Dad in California.

programme.title: Fort Bowie, (1958, Western)
programme.desc: Attempting to affect peace between his men and the Apaches, the commander of a fort unwittingly inspires an Indian massacre.

programme.title: Buffalo Bill And The Indians, (1976, Western)
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill has fought Indians & Civil War battles, but nothing can prepare him for show business! When he signs Sitting Bull for a role in his Wild West Show, the clash of cultures reverberates far beyond the boundaries of their sprawling theater.

programme.title: The Missouri Breaks, (1976, Western)
programme.desc: Marlon Brando and Jack Nicholson ignite the screen in this rousing story of a wealthy Montana rancher who hires a professional killer to track down a gang of horse thieves.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West, (1969, Western)
programme.desc: The epic story of a mysterious stranger with a harmonica who joins forces with a notorious desperado to protect a beautiful widow from a ruthless assassin working for the railroad.

programme.title: High Noon, (1951, Western)
programme.desc: Gary Cooper won the Oscar for the Best Actor in this classic tale of a lawman who stands alone to defend a town of cowardly citizens against a gang of revenge-seeking criminals.

programme.title: Man of the West, (1958, Western)
programme.desc: Screen legend Gary Cooper demonstrates why he will always be remembered as one of the most authentic stars of the screen. Capable yet vulnerable, Cooper's portrayal of a former outlaw whose past returns to haunt him ranks among his very best.

programme.title: Ghost World, (2001, Romance)
programme.desc: The story of neo-cool Enid and Rebecca who, faced with graduation from high school take a hard look at the world they wryly observe. When Rebecca focuses her attention on mutual romantic fixation Josh, the girls friendship is forever changed.

programme.title: Ghost Town, (2008, Comedy)
programme.desc: A spirited romantic comedy, Ghost Town is the story of Bertram Pincus, a cranky Manhattan dentist who develops the unwelcome ability to see dead people.

programme.title: The Longest Yard, (2005, Comedy)
programme.desc: The story of a pro quarterback and former college champion and coach are asked to put together a football team of inmates to take on the guards while doing their time in prison.

programme.title: Sex Drive, (2008, Comedy)
programme.desc: When an online hottie offers to help him become a man, Ian embarks on a wild road trip to a sure thing.

Um dia, seu pai decide vender o felino para caçadores de troféus e ela não vê outra opção além de fugir com Charlie para salvá-lo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Laços de Família, (1970)

programme.title: Ataque dos Zumbis, (1970)

programme.title: O Resgate da Princesa, (1970)

Chernomor, o malvado feiticeiro, rouba Mila diante dos olhos de Ruslan para transformar seu poder de amor em seu próprio poder mágico. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Desaparecidos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A francesa Alice Launey é uma especialista forense ainda assombrada por seu passado. Em uma viagem para Seul, na Coreia do Sul, ela apresenta seu trabalho e conhece Jin-Ho, um detetive que pede sua ajuda em um caso de assassinato. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: História de um Assassinato, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Atriz de sucesso se debate durante um pesadelo em que luta, atira e mata seu ex-namorado traficante. Ao acordar, ela descobre que o assassinato realmente ocorreu no dia anterior e que Sal, morto, está em um baú em sua sala de estar. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: As Duas Faces de Janeiro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Chester e Colette decidem fazer uma viagem de barco à Grécia. No local, eles conhecem Rydal, um guia americano que fala grego e decide ajudá-los. O que eles não sabem é que Rydal é conhecido por aplicar golpes nos turistas. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Passagem para a Vida, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um criminoso misterioso chega em uma pequena cidade planejando roubar o banco local, presumindo que tudo vai correr bem. Mas quando ele encontra um professor aposentado de poesia, seus planos tomam uma rumo improvável. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Laços de um Crime, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma família de policiais sofre um verdadeiro colapso moral. Isso porque dois irmãos, sufocados pela sombra do pai, o ex-chefe de polícia, precisam investigar um crime que eles próprios cometeram. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Xeque-Mate, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um caso de identidade trocada coloca Slevin no meio de uma guerra entre dois rivais de Nova York: Rabino e Chefe, os senhores do crime. Sob o olhar atento de um detetive e do assassino Goodkat, Slevin precisa elaborar um plano para salvar a sua pele. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Infiltrado, (1970)

programme.title: O Rei da Montanha, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Espen Ash Lad, filho de um pobre agricultor, embarca em uma missão perigosa com seus irmãos para salvar a princesa de um vilão conhecido como o Rei da Montanha. O objetivo é ganhar uma recompensa e salvar a fazenda da sua família da ruína. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Uma Viagem para a Espanha, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Steve Coogan e Rob Brydon conhecem restaurantes e hotéis da costa espanhola, trocando piadas e impressões sobre seus almoços, conversando sobre paternidade, masculinidade e envelhecimento. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Prova de Coragem, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Hermano é um médico que planeja escalar uma montanha perigosa. Ele se sente culpado pela morte de seu melhor amigo e precisa de uma prova de coragem. Mas a esposa de Hermano revela que está grávida e ele precisa tomar uma decisão. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Acima das Nuvens, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Há 20 anos, Maria ficou famosa por sua interpretação no teatro. Agora, ela tem que enfrentar que uma jovem estrela de Hollywood irá interpretar o mesmo papel. Além disso, ela é convidada a dividir o palco com a novata, mas em outro papel. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Filha de Deus, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O detetive Scott Galban busca a verdade sobre a misteriosa morte de seu parceiro. Enquanto isso, Isabel de la Cruz, uma mulher local que diz ter sido testemunha de um milagre, começa a vivenciar estranhos acontecimentos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Porta para o Inferno, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O ex-oficial da polícia de Los Angeles, Brett Anderson, começa a trabalhar como chefe de segurança em um antigo prédio na capital da Bulgária. Ele passa a presenciar uma série de eventos estranhos e se aprofunda na história do local. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Submissão, (1970)

programme.desc: South Park - T03E04

programme.title: 1999. A mãe de Cartman dá um presente para ajudá-lo a ganhar o concurso de soletrar. Trata-se de um "macaco da fonética". Neste concurso, os rapazes conhecem Marc e Rebecca, dois irmãos que não vão para a escola, pois estudam em suas casas. programme.desc: South Park - T03E13

programme.title: 2000. Cartman acha que é muito maduro para sair com Stan, Kyle e Kenny, e decide buscar novos amigos na internet, mas termina se metendo em vários problemas com pedófilos. programme.title: 2001. Cartman encontra um carregamento cheio de fetos abortados após o tombamento de um caminhão em um barranco. programme.title: 2002. Os rapazes ganham muitos doces em um concurso, mas para conseguir o grande prêmio, precisam do cupom vencedor, que é aquele que ficou com Kenny antes de morrer. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker

programme.title: 2005. Kenny consegue o último videogame portátil da cidade. programme.title: 2020. Tsunade aconselha a Lee que desista do caminho de um shinobi, e Lee relembra do seu primeiro encontro com seu professor, Guy. Incapaz de dominar nenhum ninjutsu ou genjutsu, Lee sempre foi desprezado pelos outros. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Sensei E O Aluno: O Laço Dos Shinobi!
programme.desc: Naruto: Sensei E O Aluno: O Laço Dos Shinobi! - T01E100

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe sempre quiseram ver o rosto por trás da máscara de Kakashi. Os três fazem de tudo para ver. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Você Precisa Ver! Você Precisa Conhecer! O Verdadeiro Rosto Do Kakashi Sensei!
programme.desc: Naruto: Você Precisa Ver! Você Precisa Conhecer! O Verdadeiro Rosto Do Kakashi Sensei! - T01E101

programme.title: 2020. Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura recebem uma missão B e vão para a região vizinha, a Terra do Chá. Eles devem proteger os corredores numa corrida, que acontece a cada quatro anos durante o ritual cerimonial do Santuário Todoroki. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Missão: Ajudar Um Velho Amigo Na Terra Do Chá!
programme.desc: Naruto: Missão: Ajudar Um Velho Amigo Na Terra Do Chá! - T01E102

programme.title: 2020. Os chefes da aldeia acreditam que Idate criou uma farsa do grande festival tradicional. Jirocho acredita que Idate fugiu com um plano em mente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Corrida Começou !Problemas Em Alto-Mar ! - T01E103

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e a equipe conseguem alcançar Idate, que está ferido e inconsciente, perto de Aoi. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Corre, Idate, Corre ... A Ilha Nagi O Aguarda !
programme.desc: Naruto: Corre, Idate, Corre ... A Ilha Nagi O Aguarda ! - T01E104

programme.title: 2020. Mesmo com a interferência de Aoi, Idate não para de correr. Idate não confia em ninguém ainda, e é revelado que durante a Prova Chunin, o irmão mais velho de Idate foi o examinador quem fez a décima pergunta. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Uma Batalha Feroz Do Trovão Retumbante
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Batalha Feroz Do Trovão Retumbante - T01E105

programme.title: 2020. O chefe Jirocho espera, confiante na vitória de Idate. Mas Aoi, o ninja enviado pelo clã Wagarashi, bloqueia o caminho. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Último Arranco : Um Ato Final De Desespero.
programme.desc: Naruto: O Último Arranco : Um Ato Final De Desespero. - T01E106

programme.title: 2020. Shikamaru é promovido a chunin e comemora em um restaurante com sua equipe. No hospital, Lee decide em ter a cirurgia perigosa para curar seu corpo e continuar sendo um ninja. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Batalha Começa: Naruto Contra Sasuke !
programme.desc: Naruto: A Batalha Começa: Naruto Contra Sasuke ! - T01E107

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e Sasuke usam suas melhores armas um contra o outro, e Kakashi chega para parar a luta bem a tempo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Rivais Amargos E Laços Desfeitos - T01E108

programme.title: 2020. Os Quatro Ninja do Som, Kidomaru, Sakon, Jirobo e Tayuya, aparecem de repente diante de Sasuke. Sakura fica preocupada com a Marca da Maldição em Sasuke, colocada por Orochimaru. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Sentimento De Cada Um - T02E101
programme.desc: 2009. Naruto entra na névoa para procurar yukimaru. Guren fica alerta para proteger yukimaru, cuja situação atual o impede de se mexer. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Reagrupando! - T02E102
programme.desc: 2009. Chegam os reforços da aldeia da folha. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Barreira De Selamento De Quatro Pontas - T02E103
programme.sub-title: A Barreira De Selamento De Quatro Pontas
programme.desc: 2009. Os ninjas da folha querem selar a besta de três caudas, e guren quer impedi-los de fazer isso, a qualquer preço. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Quebrando O Estilo Cristal - T02E104
programme.desc: 2009. Para proteger a barreira de selamento de quatro pontas necessária para selar a besta de três caudas, kakashi e naruto enfrentar uma mortal batalha contra guren Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Batalha Pela Barreira - T02E105
programme.desc: 2009. Kabuto planeja quebrar a barreira de quatro pontas da folha, usando o poder de yukimaru e armando uma agitação com a besta de três caudas Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Camelia Vermelha - T02E106
programme.desc: 2009. Para proteger guren da raivosa três caudas, yukimaru usa poderes além de seus limites. Comovida pela gesto dele, guren lamenta pelo seu pecado no passado de ter matado a mãe de yukimaru Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Estranhos Companheiros - T02E107
programme.desc: 2009. Para proteger yuukimaru, naruto e guren lutam lado a lado contra a besta de três caudas e são tragados. Dentro da besta há um mundo antinatural cheio de calcário Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Caminho Das Camélias - T02E108
programme.desc: 2009. Os ninja da folha descobrem que naruto está dentro da besta de três caudas. Sem outra alternativa senão confiar nos sentidos místicos de yuukimaru, kakashi e os outros seguem a orientação do menino e tentam uma missão de salvamento Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Contra Ataque Da Marca Da Maldição - T02E109
programme.sub-title: O Contra Ataque Da Marca Da Maldição
programme.desc: 2009. Apesar da tentativa de salvamento, naruto e guren não retornam. A frustração aumenta entre o grupo, mas quando a besta de três caudas desperta de seu sono, a equipe de selamento faz uma segunda tentativa com a barreira de selamento de quatro pontas. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Consciência Culpada - T02E110
programme.desc: 2009. Kabuto planeja fazer a três caudas matar os ninja da folha sacrificando o poder e a vida de yuukimaru. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Promessa Quebrada - T02E111
programme.desc: 2009. Kabuto finalmente aparece na frente de naruto. Sabendo que orochimaru usou guren e yuukimaru para seus próprios propósitos, um naruto enfurecido entra em batalha contra kabuto. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Um Lugar Para Retornar‏ - T02E112
programme.desc: 2009. Os ninjas da folha estão tratando seus ferimentos. A batalha deixou todos com sérios ferimentos. Shizune examina yuukimaru, que está em coma, mas seu corpo não é mais capaz de controlar a três caudas. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Voltando Para Casa - T01E01
programme.desc: 2007. Na aldeia da folha, a equipe de konohamaru foi promovida a genin e agora vai a missões nível d sob a supervisão de ebisu. As constante reclamações de konohamaru lembra iruka e os outros de naruto.até que uma figura passa pelos portões. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Os Akatsuki Entram Em Ação - T01E02

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Os Resultados Do Treinamento - T01E03

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Jinchuriki Da Areia - T01E04
programme.desc: 2007. Gaara rapidamente descobrir a presença da deidara, e uma batalha aérea com deidara em seu pássaro gigante e gaara acontece na areia. O jonin da areia é yura que, na verdade, é um agente da akatsuki, e a aldeia da areia sofre grandes danos. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Kazekage Se Mantém No Alto - T01E05

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Missão Cumprida - T01E06

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Corra Kankuro - T01E07
programme.desc: 2007. Gaara, totalmente sem forças, é arrastado paralonge por deidara. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Equipe Kakashi Se Mobiliza - T01E08
programme.desc: 2007. A caminho da aldeia da areia, temari encontra kakashi e sua equipe. Kakashi chama naruto quando ele tenta seguir adiante e naruto explode sua raiva pelos akatsuki. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: As Lagrimas Do Jinchuriki - T01E09

Tsunade não perde tempo em mandar a equipe kakashi para a aldeia da areia. Enquanto isso, kankuro começa a sua batalha contra os akatsuki. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Jutsu De Selamento: Nove Dragões Fantasmas! - T01E10
programme.sub-title: Jutsu De Selamento: Nove Dragões Fantasmas!
programme.desc: 2007. Os ninjas da areia lutam contra o tempo para salvar kankuro,até queumaperitaem veneno da areia, vovó chiyo é chamada.a única esperança está nos reforços enviados por tsunade. Mas naruto, sakura e kakashi são atrasados por uma tempestade de areia. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Aprendiz De Médica Ninja - T01E11
programme.desc: 2007. Sakura trata kankuro que está gravemente enfermo. Após um extenso treinamento, Sakura se tornou um incrível médica ninja e deixa todos espantados com suas mãos firmes. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Determinação Da Vovó Aposentada - T01E12
programme.desc: 2007. Pakkun acha o esconderijo dos akatsuki. A equipe kakashi e temari se preparam para resgatar, mas temari recebe ordens para ficar e ajudar a proteger a aldeia. Vovó chiyo se oferece para tomar o lugar de temari. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Um Encontro Com Destino - T01E13
programme.desc: 2007. A equipe kakashi encontra itachi uchiha, de quem sofrera uma amarga derrota no passado. Kakashi diz a todos para não olharem nos olhos sharingan de itachi. Kakashi se prepara para enfrentar itachi sozinho e pede que naruto dê cobertura. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Crescimento De Naruto - T01E14
programme.desc: 2007. Guy lamenta sua asneira ao ver seus três alunos presos pela prisão de água.determinado a parar kisame, guy o desafia usando o nunchaku, sua arma favorita. É um super taijutsu contra uma super força humana. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Esfera Secreta De Chama… - T01E15

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Segredo Do Jinchurik! - T01E16

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Morte Do Gaara - T01E17
programme.desc: 2007. As equipes kakashi e guy fazem uma pausa.vovó chiyo observa naruto cochilar e lembra de sasori quando criança. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Postura Tática: Operação Entrada Em Gancho! - T01E18
programme.sub-title: Postura Tática: Operação Entrada Em Gancho!
programme.desc: 2007. As equipe kakashi e guy chegam ao esconderijo dos akatsuki. Eles correm para se infiltrar mas são parados por uma barreira de cinco selos. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Hiruko Contra Duas Kunoichi! - T01E20
programme.desc: 2007. Finalmente a luta entre avó e neto começa. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Verdadeiro Rosto De Sasori - T01E21
programme.desc: 2007. Vovóchiyo e sakura conseguem expor sasori, que incrivelmente não envelheceu nada nos últimos vinte anos.chiyo fica ainda mais chocada com o segundo boneco que sasori revela. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: As Habilidades Secretas De Chiyo - T01E22
programme.desc: 2007. Sakura é pega pelas táticas de sasori e fica cercada por uma nuvem de veneno. Mas ela usa uma papel bomba para se livrar da fumaçavenenosa. Ela resolver se arriscar a capturar sasori para forçá-lo a dar informações sobre o paradeiro de orochimaru. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Pai E Mãe - T01E23
programme.desc: 2007. A maior vantagem dos bonecos criados de humanos é que ele pode assumir o comando do jutsu que o humano usava enquanto vivo.consequentemente, o boneco do terceiro kazekage tem ahabilidade especial de converter chakra em poder magnético. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Terceiro Kazekage - T01E24
programme.desc: 2007. Sakura revida oataque da areia de ferro do boneco do terceiro kazekage com uma força sobre-humana. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Três Minutos Entre A Vida E A Morte - T01E25
programme.sub-title: Três Minutos Entre A Vida E A Morte
programme.desc: 2007. Sakura destrói o boneco do terceiro kazekage graças a um antídoto secreto que ela tomou. programme.sub-title: Luta Entre Marionetes: Dez Contra Cem!
programme.desc: 2007. Sakura e vovó chiyo estão enfrentando uma batalha feroz contra sasori, onde ele pode se tornar um boneco humano. Elas derrotam sasori dentro do prazo, mas ele acaba revivendo. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Um Sonho Impossível - T01E27
programme.desc: 2007. Embora tenha sido envenenada, vovó chiyo usa o últimoantídoto em sakura. Zombando da terna cena entre vovó chiyo e sakura, sasori tenta por fim à vida de vovó chiyo. Mas vovó chiyo revida e derrota sasori. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Kakashi Iluminado - T01E29
programme.desc: 2007. Sakura corre para achar naruto com a vovó chiyo, que está sofrendo com o veneno. Os membros da equipe guy correm paraajudar a equipe kakashi. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Estética De Um Momento - T01E30
programme.desc: 2007. Na Aldeia da Folha, a equipe de Konohamaru foi promovida a Genin e agora está sob a supervisão de Ebisu. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Legado - T01E31

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Volta Do Kazekage - T01E32

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Um Novo Alvo - T01E33
programme.desc: 2007. Gaara percebe a presença de Deidara e começa uma batalha aérea na areia. O jonin da areia é Yura, um agente da Akatsuki, e a Aldeia da Areia sofre danos. Baki fica preocupado que o shukaku se materialize, mas Kankuro ri da ideia. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Uma Adição Indesejada - T01E35

programme.title: 2002. O Rei Pantera, o general da tribo Pantera, começa a se mover com o poder da Jóia. Inuyasha e Sesshomaru atacam a múmia. Sango está confusa sobre como ela recusará sua proposta de casamento. programme.title: Weeds

programme.title: Hector and the Search for Happiness
programme.desc: A search by a disillusioned psychiatrist for the key to his happiness takes him around the world on a journey. Starring Simon Pegg, Toni Collette, Rosamund Pike.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Looking to share a quiet evening out with Abby, Will and his date are abducted en route to the restaurant by a gang leader who faces certain death without their help; upon learning the abductors identity, Magnus ceases all attempts at rescue.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr Helen Magnus, a 158-year-old English scientist, seeks out extraordinarily-powered creatures, known as Abnormals.

programme.title: Upside Down

programme.desc: A small-town teenager (Hilary Duff) defies her father (David Keith) and heads to Los Angeles to study at a performing arts school. Starring Hilary Duff, Oliver James, David Keith.

programme.desc: David Smallbone moves his family to the United States to search for a brighter future. Starring Joel Smallbone, Daisy Betts, Kirrilee Berger.

programme.desc: In 1940s New York, a man (Hugh Grant) goes to extreme lengths to make sure his wife (Meryl Streep) never finds out that shes an awful opera singer. Starring Meryl Streep, Hugh Grant, Simon Helberg.

programme.desc: The resourceful detective (Robert Downey Jr.) and his astute partner, Dr. Watson (Jude Law), meet a powerful criminal, a devotee of black magic who arises from his grave. Starring Robert Downey, Jude Law, Rachel McAdams.

programme.desc: The murder of Austrias crown prince leads Holmes (Robert Downey Jr.), Watson (Jude Law) and a Gypsy (Noomi Rapace) to a showdown with an evil genius named Moriarty (Jared Harris). Starring Robert Downey, Jude Law, Noomi Rapace.

programme.title: Bagman
programme.desc: A father faces a childhood threat that resurfaces suddenly. He battles his deepest fear, not for himself, but to protect his family from the sinister danger. Starring Sam Claflin, Antonia Thomas, William Hope.

programme.desc: A close encounter with mysterious lights sends two teens on the run after one discovers she has extraordinary but dangerous powers. Starring Stefanie Scott, Theodore Pellerin, Said Taghmaoui.

programme.title: Grey Gardens
programme.desc: Former socialites Edith Bouvier Beale and daughter Edie, 56, become recluses in a decrepit New York mansion.

programme.desc: A young boy is sent to live with his grandparents in a remote indigenous community. Starring Timmy Masso, Grace George, Joe Martin.

programme.title: Superman II
programme.desc: The Man of Steel (Christopher Reeve) gets serious with Lois Lane (Margot Kidder) and fights three Krypton outcasts in league with Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman). Starring Christopher Reeve, Margot Kidder, Gene Hackman.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: The Caped Crusader (Michael Keaton) saves dismal Gotham City and gorgeous Vicki Vale (Kim Basinger) from the freaky Joker (Jack Nicholson). Starring Jack Nicholson, Michael Keaton, Kim Basinger.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: Bruce Banner, a genetics researcher with a tragic past, suffers an accident that causes him to transform into a raging green monster when he gets angry. Starring Eric Bana, Jennifer Connelly, Sam Elliott.

programme.title: Wonder Woman

programme.desc: Under the watchful eye of mentor Tony Stark, high school student Peter Parker starts to embrace his newfound identity as Spider-Man to battle the evil Vulture. Starring Tom Holland, Michael Keaton, Robert Downey.

programme.title: The Shape of Water
programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works in a hidden, high-security government laboratory. Her life changes forever when she discovers the labs classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. Starring Sally Hawkins, Michael Shannon, Richard Jenkins.

programme.title: Splice
programme.desc: An experiment goes horribly wrong when two scientists (Adrien Brody, Sarah Polley) use human DNA to create a hybrid creature. Starring Adrien Brody, Sarah Polley, Delphine Chaneac.

programme.title: Running on Empty
programme.desc: Mort discovers he has less than a year to live. After his fiance leaves him, he meets Kate on a dating service that matches people by their death dates, all while being stalked by a crazy pimp. Starring Keir Gilchrist, Lucy Hale, Francesca Eastwood.

programme.title: Barbarian
programme.desc: A young woman discovers the rental home she booked is already occupied by a stranger. programme.title: Waterloo Bridge
programme.desc: A ballet dancer (Vivien Leigh) and a British officer (Robert Taylor) cross stars on the eve of World War I. Starring Vivien Leigh, Robert Taylor, Lucile Watson.

programme.title: Going My Way
programme.desc: Singing Father OMalley (Bing Crosby) bails out crusty Father Fitzgibbons (Barry Fitzgerald) financially strapped parish. Starring Bing Crosby, Barry Fitzgerald, Rise Stevens.

programme.title: Elmer Gantry
programme.desc: An Oscar-winning adaptation of the Sinclair Lewis novel about religious fervor in small-town America. Starring Burt Lancaster, Jean Simmons, Dean Jagger.

programme.title: A Man for All Seasons
programme.desc: Sir Thomas More (Paul Scofield) opposes Henry VIIIs (Robert Shaw) appointing himself head of the Church of England. Starring Paul Scofield, Robert Shaw, Orson Welles.

programme.desc: A Ukrainian bishop (Anthony Quinn) and former Siberian prisoner is sent to Rome, made cardinal and elected pope. Starring Anthony Quinn, Laurence Olivier, Oskar Werner.

programme.title: Hallelujah
programme.desc: A cotton picker (Daniel L. Haynes) turns preacher and meets a Tennessee temptress (Nina Mae McKinney) and her man (William Fountaine). Starring Daniel L. Haynes, Nina Mae McKinney, William Fountaine.

programme.title: One Foot in Heaven
programme.desc: A Methodist minister (Fredric March) and his wife (Martha Scott) raise a family through years of challenge in small-town parishes. Starring Fredric March, Martha Scott, Beulah Bondi.

programme.title: Black Fury
programme.desc: A simple Pennsylvania coal miner is drawn into the violent conflict between union workers and management. Starring Paul Muni, Karen Morley, William Gargan.

programme.title: The Organizer
programme.desc: A political refugee visiting an Italian friend in 19th-century Turin leads a strike and helps form a labor union. Starring Marcello Mastroianni, Renato Salvatori, Gabriella Giorgelli.

programme.title: The Valley of Decision
programme.desc: A steel tycoons (Donald Crisp) son (Gregory Peck) loves the family maid, an Irish steelworkers daughter (Greer Garson), in late-1800s Pittsburgh. Starring Greer Garson, Gregory Peck, Donald Crisp.

programme.title: Harlan County, U.S.A.
programme.desc: Filmmaker Barbara Kopple documents Kentucky coal miners facing brutal opposition during a 1973 strike.

programme.title: On the Waterfront

programme.title: A Room With a View
programme.desc: An English miss (Helena Bonham-Carter) tours 1907 Florence, Italy, with her cousin (Maggie Smith) and meets a soulmate (Julian Sands). Starring Helena Bonham Carter, Maggie Smith, Julian Sands.

programme.title: The Talented Mr. Ripley
programme.desc: A young man (Matt Damon) travels to 1950s Italy and begins to assume the identity of a playboy (Jude Law) he was hired to bring back to the United States. Starring Matt Damon, Gwyneth Paltrow, Jude Law.

programme.title: Death in Venice
programme.desc: Music by Gustav Mahler accompanies the tale of a composer (Dirk Bogarde) who adores a beautiful youth (Bjorn Andresen) in cholera-ridden Venice. Starring Dirk Bogarde, Bjorn Andresen, Silvana Mangano.

programme.title: Indiscretion of an American Wife
programme.desc: A Philadelphian (Jennifer Jones) says goodbye to her Italian lover (Montgomery Clift) at the train station in Rome. Starring Jennifer Jones, Montgomery Clift, Gino Cervi.

programme.desc: A man (Don DeFore) hires a private eye (Jack Carson) to watch his wife (Janis Paige) on a cruise, but the wife sends an impostor. Starring Jack Carson, Janis Paige, Don DeFore.

programme.title: Now, Voyager
programme.desc: A Boston spinster (Bette Davis) finds a lover (Paul Henreid) after the counsel of a kind psychiatrist (Claude Rains) brings her out of her frumpy shell. Starring Bette Davis, Claude Rains, Paul Henreid.

programme.desc: Troubles aboard a captains (George Sanders) sinking liner include a mans (Robert Stack) wife (Dorothy Malone) trapped with her head above water. Starring Robert Stack, Dorothy Malone, George Sanders.

programme.desc: An aging barrister (Charles Laughton) defends a man (Tyrone Power) for murder despite damaging testimony from the accuseds wife (Marlene Dietrich). Starring Tyrone Power, Marlene Dietrich, Charles Laughton.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Boy Trouble
programme.desc: A sexist school board member ignores Reginas funding proposal while green-lighting Steves harebrained ideas.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Guess Whos Not Coming to Counseling
programme.desc: Steve poses as Lovitas fiance when Cedric cant attend a counseling session with a renowned minister.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Moonlighting
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) gets evicted from his apartment; Regina falls for an author who has a strange fetish.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Dont Stand Too Close to Me
programme.desc: Steve leads Reginas teen-feminist discussion group; Cedric and Lovita socialize with another couple.

programme.title: The Harlem Globetrotters: Secrets of the City - Mexico City
programme.desc: Join the Harlem Globetrotters on a whirlwind adventure through Mexico City! They dive into ancient tales by gliding along historic canals and soaring over majestic pyramids. Next, they feast like royals in a one-of-a-kind cave restaurant.

programme.title: The Harlem Globetrotters: Secrets of the City - Stuttgart; Sydney
programme.desc: In Stuttgart, Germany, join the spring festival in traditional German attire and connect with the local Black expat community; Bulldog and Wham travel to Sydney, Australia, where they dive into the world of traditional Aussie sports.

programme.title: Steps of Faith
programme.desc: Mocked by her family for opening a hippotherapy farm for children, Faith questions her message from God after a child is nearly injured and the work is overwhelming.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Ellipse Fit by LegXercise-FREE Deluxe Offer for First 300 Callers!
programme.desc: Do you spend too many hours sitting at a desk? Do you have a tough time exercising due to joint pain? Ellipse Fit will strengthen your legs, boost mobility, and improve circulation with low impact leg movement. Order NOW And claim your FREE Bonus!

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: Protect Your Family from Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity, and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Protect Your Family from Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity, and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn whats behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQs Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - You Choose Your Friends
programme.desc: Friends are the family people choose, for better or worse.

programme.title: City Eats: Atlanta - Virgils Gullah Kitchen And Bar
programme.desc: Chef Kristol Bryant learns and tastes the legacy of the Gullah Geechee and the foundation of Americas soul food.

programme.title: City Eats: Atlanta - Patria Cocina
programme.desc: Secret menus and rare agave liquors make this innovative Mexican kitchen a mainstay on Chef Kristol Bryants culinary map of Atlanta.

programme.title: City Eats: Atlanta - Thai Kitchen and Bar
programme.desc: Dining like royalty with Chef Kristol Bryant at a fun and grown experimental haven for Thai delicacies.

programme.title: City Eats: Atlanta - Paschals
programme.desc: Serving up a plate of history, Chef Kristol Bryant dines where Martin Luther King Jr. himself once sat, and enjoys the famous fried chicken.

programme.title: Different With Me
programme.desc: Years after being unceremoniously dumped and getting swept off her feet by another man, the ex-boyfriend who broke Kalis heart returns with an offer.

programme.title: Really Love
programme.desc: A rising Black painter tries to break into the competitive art world while balancing an unexpected romance with an ambitious law student.

programme.title: Family Time - Its a Grey Area
programme.desc: Tony is upset when he discovers a grey hair and Lisa is amused.

programme.title: Family Time - The First Rule of Fight Night Is You Do Not Talk About Fight Night
programme.desc: Tony hosts fight night with his friends on the same night as Lisas dinner party.

programme.title: Family Time - The Will
programme.desc: Tony and Lisas family argue over who should take custody of their children if something happens to them.

programme.title: Family Time - No New Friends
programme.desc: When an old friend of Tonys moves into the neighborhood, the Stallworths realize things arent exactly as they seem.

programme.title: Family Time - Hospitality
programme.desc: Lisa invites Tonys godparents to stay for a few nights but no one can get them to leave.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Wrestling With a Sticky Situation
programme.desc: When Jordan joins the wrestling team, he overeats and finds himself in a weight class in which he is outmatched.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Marathon Mac
programme.desc: When Bernie agrees to participate in a celebrity marathon, Vanessa declares that she will finish the race ahead of him.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Big Payback
programme.desc: When Bernie gives Vanessa money for school clothes, she decides to spend it all on an expensive pair of shoes.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Car Wars
programme.desc: Curtis offers to help fix Vanessas new car, but Bernie thinks he has an ulterior motive.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Night of Terror
programme.desc: While baby-sitting Bryana, Jordan watches a horror movie and scares himself into believing that zombies are trying to kill him and Bryana.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Ring Around the Piggy
programme.desc: Steve fears he will lose Regina forever when he is invited to Warringtons house for an announcement.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - The He-Man, Player-Haters Club
programme.desc: Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer) take Regina and Lovita (Wendy Raquel Robinson, Terri J. Vaughn) to casino night at the Onyx Club in Chicago.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Thats a Bunch of Bull, Ced
programme.desc: Cedric and Steve (Cedric The Entertainer, Steve Harvey) get choice tickets for Game 7 of the NBA finals, but there is a catch.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Baby You Can Drive My Car
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) has trouble when Bullethead and Romeo (William Lee Scott, Merlin Santana) take the keys to the drivers education car.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Grassy Knoll
programme.desc: Michael and Jay play mind games on Junior after they discover he has been smoking marijuana; Kady wants to spend more time with her big sister.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Of Breasts and Basketball
programme.desc: Michael has difficulty coping when Junior beats him at basketball; Claire buys a a padded bra to impress boys.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Wedlocked
programme.desc: On Cedric and Lovitas (Cedric The Entertainer, Terri J. Vaughn) wedding day, Steve (Steve Harvey) and the groom find themselves locked in a basement.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - African-American Gigolo
programme.desc: Steve and Regina set each other up with blind dates; Cedrics basketball game rituals drive the others crazy.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - If Cooks Could Kill
programme.desc: Emotions boil over when Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer) compete against Regina and Lovita (Wendy Raquel Robinson, Terri J. Vaughn) in a cooking contest.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - I Believe I Can Lie
programme.desc: Steve must break the news to Regina and the students that Michael Jordan canceled as speaker for Entrepreneur Day.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Making the Grade
programme.desc: Junior attempts to fool his parents into believing he got an A for his algebra assignment, but the scheme backfires when Janet and Michael treat him like a prodigy.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Working It
programme.desc: Michael hires an attractive tutor in hopes of invoking Juniors passion for math.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Living My Truth
programme.desc: Live ones truth in ones words and actions.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Raging Election
programme.desc: Bernie calls on India.Arie to help out with Vanessas talent show.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Leaving Los Angeles
programme.desc: Bernie delays his Las Vegas flight to take the children to the movies as promised; Bryanna and Jordan sneak out of a G-rated movie to watch more-exciting fare.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade (1989)
programme.sub-title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade (1989)
programme.desc: Archaeologist Jones (Harrison Ford) rescues his kidnapped father (Sean Connery), and the two race the Nazis to find the Holy Grail.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull (2008)
programme.sub-title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull (2008)
programme.desc: Indy (Harrison Ford) and a young adventurer (Shia La Beouf) must ferret out a powerful artifact and keep it out of the hands of a deadly Soviet agent (Cate Blanchett).

programme.title: The Heartbreak Kid (2007)
programme.desc: After his new bride reveals her nasty nature, a man (Ben Stiller) meets the woman (Michelle Monaghan) who may be his real soul mate and tries to woo her.

programme.title: American Gigolo (1980)
programme.desc: A professional Beverly Hills escort falls in love with a big shots wife and winds up framed for murder.

programme.title: Sexterior Motives (2025)
programme.desc: Aurora is a femme fatale who finds herself in a twisted tale of passion and betrayal. Driven by lust, Jessica and Tony attempt to ruin Auroras husband but when Auroras lover, Connie, thwarts their plan, all chaos ensues..

programme.title: The Painter (2024)
programme.desc: An ex-CIA operative is tracked down by a young woman and they become entangled in an unauthorized black ops program.

programme.title: Disgraced (2017)
programme.desc: An examination of the events surrounding the 2003 murder of Baylor University mens basketball star Patrick Dennehy.

programme.title: McEnroe (2022)
programme.desc: John McEnroe finally tells his side of his storied career and performances on the court.

programme.title: Freedoms Path (2022)
programme.desc: When Union soldier William runs from battle, hes taken to safety by a heroic young Black man. Kitch is part of a secret community of freed slaves running a section of the Underground Railroad, but a desperate slave catcher is on their trail.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers (2002)
programme.desc: A lieutenant colonel and approximately 400 U.S. troops battle 2,000 North Vietnamese soldiers in 1965.

programme.title: Before Dawn (2024)
programme.desc: A young man joins his countrymen on the Western front of World War I, hoping to expedite an end to the bloody conflict. However, as the battle rages on, hes forced to grapple with the brutal realities of trench warfare.

programme.title: Event Horizon (1997)
programme.desc: A spaceship missing for seven years finally re-emerges and sends out a distress signal. But when a team is sent out to investigate, they discover that something sinister has taken over the craft.

programme.title: Black Lotus (2023)
programme.desc: A soldier uses his military training to rescue the kidnapped daughter of his dead friend.

programme.title: Eagle Eye (2008)
programme.desc: Two strangers (Shia LaBeouf, Michelle Monaghan) become pawns of a mysterious woman who threatens their friends and family and uses technology to control their actions.

programme.title: Fight or Flight (2024)
programme.desc: A mercenary takes on the job of tracking a high-value asset known only as "The Ghost" on an international flight. Realizing the plane is filled with assassins assigned to kill them both, the pair must work together in a fight for their lives.

programme.title: Old Guy (2024)
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn theyre being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: Scream 4 (2011)
programme.desc: The Ghostface Killer returns with a vengeance when self-help author Sidney Prescott arrives in Woodsboro on the last stop of her book tour.

programme.title: The Yards (2000)
programme.desc: A friends lure of easy money draws an ex-con into the corrupt world of his uncles subway-train business.

programme.title: The Killer Inside Me (2010)
programme.desc: An encounter with an aggressive prostitute (Jessica Alba) brings a Texas lawmans (Casey Affleck) homicidal tendencies screaming to the surface.

programme.title: Camp X-Ray (2014)
programme.desc: A female guard at Guantánamo Bay forms an unlikely friendship with one of the facilitys longtime detainees.

programme.title: Captive (2015)
programme.desc: Recovering drug addict Ashley Smith (Kate Mara) reads Rick Warrens "The Purpose Driven Life" as armed fugitive Brian Nichols (David Oyelowo) holds her hostage in her apartment.

programme.title: The Survivalist (2021)
programme.desc: A year and a half after the fall of civilization due to a viral outbreak, a former FBI agent is forced to protect a young woman immune to the disease from a dangerous gang leader hunting her.

programme.title: The Bye Bye Man (2017)
programme.desc: A couple (Douglas Smith, Cressida Bonas) and their friend (Lucien Laviscount) stumble upon the horrific origins of the Bye Bye Man (Doug Jones), a mysterious figure that they discover is the root cause of the evil behind the most unspeakable acts.

programme.title: Dont Knock Twice (2016)
programme.desc: A mother looking to reconnect with her estranged daughter attracts the attention of a demonic witch.

programme.title: Kindred (2025)
programme.desc: A pair of twisted, young criminals decide to break into a mansion for one big score, but they soon find out that the owners of the house are much more dangerous than they are.

programme.title: Switchback (1997)
programme.desc: A college student (Jared Leto) and a former rail worker (Danny Glover) are suspects in an FBI agents (Dennis Quaid) hunt for a serial killer who abducted his son.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October (1990)
programme.desc: Moscow, Washington and a CIA analyst (Alec Baldwin) track a renegade Soviet captain (Sean Connery) and his new submarine.

programme.title: The Contractor (2022)
programme.desc: When his new assignment goes awry, an elite soldier finds himself hunted and on the run, caught in a dangerous conspiracy and fighting to stay alive long enough to get home and uncover the true motives of those who betrayed him.

programme.title: Serpico (1973)
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Frank Serpico, who sacrificed his career to expose widespread corruption in the NYPD.

programme.title: No Country for Old Men (2007)
programme.desc: An aging lawman (Tommy Lee Jones) reflects on his past and laments a changing world while trying to find and protect a hunter who took the cash from a drug deal gone bad.

programme.title: Changing Lanes (2002)
programme.desc: An attorney and a recovering alcoholic have a car accident which swiftly escalates into an ongoing, bitter feud.

programme.title: Sleeping Dogs (2024)
programme.desc: Suffering from memory loss, a former homicide detective tries to solve a brutal murder that he cant recall. As he pieces together evidence from a decade-old investigation, he soon uncovers a sinister web of buried secrets tied to his forgotten past.

programme.title: The Salvation (2014)
programme.desc: After shooting the man who murdered his wife, a Danish settler (Mads Mikkelsen) incurs the wrath of the mans brother (Jeffrey Dean Morgan), a ruthless land baron who rules their frontier town.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County (2023)
programme.sub-title: The Last Stop in Yuma County (2023)
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a traveling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: The Outlaws (2024)
programme.desc: A group of outlaws awaken to their empty train heist bag. Interrogations begin as each cowboy becomes the focus in an attempt to unmask the thief among them. Tensions mount as each bandit struggles to clear their name before bullets fly.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick (2022)
programme.desc: Pete "Maverick" Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navys top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: The Godfather (1972)
programme.desc: Crime boss Vito Corleone and his sons, the ruthless yet loyal members of the Corleone family, rule their secretive New York empire with an iron fist.

programme.title: The Godfather, Part II (1974)
programme.desc: Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) rules his fathers criminal empire, while flashbacks recall young Vitos (Robert De Niro) climb to power.

programme.title: Losing Isaiah (1995)
programme.desc: An ex-crack addict (Halle Berry) fights for custody of her son adopted by a social worker (Jessica Lange) and her husband (David Strathairn).

programme.title: Like Water for Chocolate (1992)
programme.desc: The youngest daughter (Lumi Cavazos) of a Mexican family expresses her feelings in preparing wonderful food, when tradition keeps her from marrying her true love (Marco Leonardi).

programme.title: Frida (2002)
programme.desc: Mexican painter Frida Kahlo (Salma Hayek) marries fellow artist Diego Rivera who shares her radical political views.

programme.title: The Talented Mr. Ripley (1999)
programme.desc: A young man (Matt Damon) travels to 1950s Italy and begins to assume the identity of a playboy (Jude Law) he was hired to bring back to the United States.

programme.title: The Edge of Seventeen (2016)
programme.desc: A high school junior (Hailee Steinfeld) develops an unexpected bond with a thoughtful teen (Hayden Szeto) after learning that her best friend (Haley Lu Richardson) is dating her older brother (Blake Jenner).

programme.title: Mothers Day (2016)
programme.desc: As Mothers Day draws near, a single mom (Jennifer Aniston) learns that her ex-husband (Timothy Olyphant) is marrying a younger woman (Shay Mitchell), while a recently widowed man (Jason Sudeikis) struggles to raise his two daughters.

programme.title: Til Death Do Us Part (2017)
programme.desc: Madison Roland finds love with another man after she leaves her abusive husband, Michael, and changes her identity. All seems well, until Michael discovers Madisons whereabouts and re-creates her nightmare all over again.

programme.title: Seaside (2018)
programme.desc: A woman decides to run away to the Oregon coast with her boyfriend when he inherits a family beach house.

programme.title: Jennys Wedding (2015)
programme.desc: When Jenny (Katherine Heigl) decides to marry a woman (Alexis Bledel), her conventional family must accept who she is or risk losing her forever.

programme.title: The Argument (2020)
programme.desc: When a couple argue about a party and neither will back down, they decide to re-create the evening to determine who is right.

programme.title: Winter Spring Summer or Fall (2024)
programme.desc: Young Remi has her future figured out, until she meets Barnes, who lives for the moment and makes her question everything. As their love story unfolds, she faces a choice -- stick to her plan or risk it all for a life she never saw coming.

programme.title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (2008)
programme.sub-title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (2008)
programme.desc: Benjamin Button (Brad Pitt) is born an old man in 1918 New Orleans and ages in reverse and, in so doing, becomes intimately familiar with the natures of love and death.

programme.title: Our Friend (2019)
programme.desc: After Nicole and Matthew receive life-altering news, the couple find unexpected support from their friend Dane, who puts his own life on hold to move into their family home.

programme.title: Bounce (2000)
programme.desc: An ad executive (Ben Affleck) seeks out the widow (Gwyneth Paltrow) of a stranger who swapped tickets with him before boarding an ill-fated flight.

programme.title: Jersey Girl (2004)
programme.desc: A young woman (Liv Tyler) changes the life of a single father (Ben Affleck) who used to be a successful New York music publicist.

programme.title: The Reader (2008)
programme.desc: In postwar Germany, a teenager (David Kross) has a love affair with an older woman (Kate Winslet) who is hiding a terrible secret.

programme.title: Ask the Dust (2006)
programme.desc: In Depression-era Los Angeles, a fiery Mexican waitress (Salma Hayek) who wants to improve her lot through marriage meets an aspiring writer (Colin Farrell) of Italian descent.

programme.title: The Beldham (2024)
programme.desc: A struggling new mother fights a generations-old presence lurking within her familys home, threatening her safety, her sanity, and the life of her infant child.

programme.title: Election (1999)
programme.desc: Tracy faces no competition in her high school election, but the civics teacher intervenes by encouraging the varsity football player to run for president, resulting in chaos.

programme.title: Sixteen Candles (1984)
programme.desc: A girl turning 16 likes another girls guy (Michael Schoeffling) and feels nobody cares about her birthday.

programme.title: Flashdance (1983)
programme.desc: A Pittsburgh welder works days, dances in a bar at night, dates her boss and chases the dream of acceptance into a prestigious ballet school.

programme.title: Shes All That (1999)
programme.desc: A cool teen (Freddie Prinze Jr.) bets a friend that he can transform the schools geekiest girl (Rachael Leigh Cook) into a prom queen.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Diary (2001)
programme.desc: An outrageous British woman (Renee Zellweger) decides to take control of her life, but instead falls for two very different men (Colin Firth, Hugh Grant).

programme.title: No Strings Attached (2011)
programme.desc: After sex enters the equation, two lifelong friends (Natalie Portman, Ashton Kutcher) make a pact to keep their relationship purely physical.

programme.title: Eagle vs. Shark (2007)
programme.desc: A socially awkward fast-food waitress (Loren Horsley) flips over a video-game clerk (Jemaine Clement), who is busy plotting revenge on a bully from his past.

programme.title: The Virgin Suicides (1999)
programme.desc: Men reminisce about intriguing sisters, whose parents (James Woods, Kathleen Turner) quarantined them after one of the five killed herself.

programme.title: Would You Rather (2012)
programme.desc: Iris (Brittany Snow) and seven other desperate people become trapped in Shepards (Jeffrey Combs) mansion. Shepard forces them to play a sadistic game for a large sum of money -- but the dilemmas become increasingly deadly.

programme.title: Personal Shopper (2016)
programme.desc: A young American in Paris works as a personal shopper for a celebrity. She seems to have the ability to communicate with spirits, like her recently deceased twin brother. Soon, she starts to receive ambiguous messages from an unknown source.

programme.title: Shell (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: Sound of Violence (2021)
programme.desc: A young killer experiences intense pleasure whenever she hears the sound of human pain.

programme.title: Bottom of the 9th (2019)
programme.desc: After serving 17 years in prison for a violent mistake he made in his youth, a once-aspiring baseball player returns to his Bronx neighborhood.

programme.title: Win a Date With Tad Hamilton! (2004)
programme.sub-title: Win a Date With Tad Hamilton! (2004)
programme.desc: Secretly in love with his friend (Kate Bosworth), a supermarket manager (Topher Grace) becomes jealous when she meets a famous actor (Josh Duhamel).

programme.title: Roman Holiday (1953)
programme.desc: A young princess (Audrey Hepburn), tired of her constraints, runs off with a U.S. newsman (Gregory Peck) in Rome.

programme.title: Boys and Girls (2000)
programme.desc: Two longtime friends (Freddie Prinze Jr., Claire Forlani), each with a string of failed romances, wonder if they should date each other.

programme.title: Bride and Prejudice (2004)
programme.desc: Mrs Bakshi is looking for suitable husbands for her daughters. When the rich single gents Balraj and Darcy visit, the Bakshis have high hopes, but circumstances get in the way of romance.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert (2015)
programme.desc: Gertrude Bells life as an explorer, cartographer, and archaeologist for the British Empire.

programme.title: Queen Bees (2021)
programme.desc: While her house undergoes repairs, fiercely independent senior Helen temporarily moves into a nearby retirement community, where she encounters lusty widows, cutthroat bridge tournaments and a hotbed of bullying "mean girls."

programme.title: Mothers Day (2016)
programme.desc: As Mothers Day draws near, a single mom (Jennifer Aniston) learns that her ex-husband (Timothy Olyphant) is marrying a younger woman (Shay Mitchell), while a recently widowed man (Jason Sudeikis) struggles to raise his two daughters.

programme.title: The Edge of Seventeen (2016)
programme.desc: A high school junior (Hailee Steinfeld) develops an unexpected bond with a thoughtful teen (Hayden Szeto) after learning that her best friend (Haley Lu Richardson) is dating her older brother (Blake Jenner).

programme.title: Save the Last Dance (2001)
programme.desc: A white teenager (Julia Stiles) moves to Chicago after her mothers death and falls for a black student (Sean Patrick Thomas) who shares her love of dance.

programme.sub-title: Choosing the Right Topwater Bait (2 Days) and Dog Days Walleyes
programme.desc: Jon spends two days testing and teaching the art of choosing the perfect topwater lure for changing conditions -covering everything from walking baits to prop baits. Then he cools off with a mid-summer walleye mission.
